headline: MAIN is release-ready for 0.12.0 — everything merged. This session CLOSED: #64 (Astro consumption — /brand overlay bridge + CONSUMING.md §12, PR #111; proven in clients#30 pixel-identical); #62 (multi-brand data-brand + HdsThemeProvider runtime switch, test-locked); #60 (variant contract — the 4 remaining public components with a real paint axis migrated to Tailwind+cva: heading-stack #112, activity-feed #113 [status→tone, error→danger alias], side-nav #114, doc-link-card #115 [motion preserved]; Chromatic '433 tests unchanged' = zero visual diffs; utility-tier dev-shell explicitly exempt); #48 + #109 (Satoshi typography — swapped in Figma via use_figma Plugin API: flipped typography/family/display variable Clash Display→Satoshi, all heading roles alias it, also fixed a missing-font fallback; awaits a library Publish click). #109's swap was a single variable edit. PRIOR merged: layout epic #95 (#92/#96/#97/#98), #93 CSS-in-JS→Tailwind (#103-#108).
next: CUT @hirobius/design-system 0.12.0 — main carries the minor changeset (/brand + overlay bridge) plus 6 patch/minor changesets from the #60 migrations. check:release/publish is human-only. Then clients#30 runs pnpm install to wire the factory against the published version.
Figma: click Publish on the HDS Tokens & Components library so the Satoshi display-family change (#109) propagates to consuming files.
Repo-wide: the Vercel *deployment* status errors on every PR (non-required; the required 'Vercel Preview Comments' check passes) — worth a separate look at the Vercel project config, not a blocker.
Human-gated (not release blockers): #47 Figma Code Connect; #80 Chromatic baseline review + freeze; #86 secrets standard (Bitwarden classification).
Deferred Phase 2: #66 expression layer; #68 niche reskins (targets hirobius.io repo; unblocked by #62).
blocked: #64 clients wiring (clients#30) waits on the 0.12.0 npm release (proven locally against a pnpm-pack tarball).
#109 propagation waits on a manual Figma library Publish (the variable edit itself is done).
